children.heading: Authority for alternative form of annuity
children.label: a Authority for alternative form of annuity
children.text: The Director shall prescribe regulations under which any participant who has a life-threatening affliction or other critical medical condition may, at the time of retiring under this subchapter (other than under ), elect annuity benefits under this section instead of any other benefits under this subchapter (including any survivor benefits under this subchapter) based on the service of the participant creditable under this subchapter.section 2051 of this title

children.heading: Basis for alternative forms of annuity
children.label: b Basis for alternative forms of annuity
children.text: The regulations and alternative forms of annuity shall, to the maximum extent practicable, meet the requirements prescribed in .section 8343a of title 5

children.heading: Lump-sum credit
children.label: c Lump-sum credit
children.text: Any lump-sum credit provided pursuant to an election under subsection (a) shall not preclude an individual from receiving other benefits provided under that subsection.

children.heading: Submission of regulations to congressional intelligence committees
children.label: d Submission of regulations to congressional intelligence committees
children.text: The Director shall submit the regulations prescribed under subsection (a) to the congressional intelligence committees before the regulations take effect.
